name: SaaS-of-record (current math floor)
notes: Current 5-year projections at sim-comp multiples. Lupine becomes a respectable Synopsys-tier vertical software company. This is the math floor on the homepage.

name: Audit substrate (mid-platform)
notes: By FY35: $2T addressable from mid-ramp of phases 2-3; Lupine captures the median platform-infra rate (0.20%) at mid-platform multiples (17x). Comparable to Cloudflare or Hugging Face mature.

notes: By FY40: phase-3 fully landed; Lupine is to atomistic ML what Synopsys is to EDA on a $5T/yr addressable. ~0.5% capture rate at 18x multiple.

name: Civilizational classical-materials infra
notes: By FY45: phase-4 partially landed. Lupine is the canonical audit+compute layer for programmable matter at narrow material classes. $10T addressable * 1.0% capture * 20x multiple. Comparable to AWS/Azure infra revenue scale.

name: Phase-5 quantum unlocks (mid-quantum)
notes: By FY50: fault-tolerant quantum compute + commercial fusion + room-temp SC partially landed. Quantum-engineered materials addressable: $50T/yr (mid-range of quantum_unlocks.csv $80T full estimate). Lupine captures 1.0% as the audit substrate that quantum-classical hybrid simulations structurally require, at 22x platform-infra multiple.

name: Phase-5 quantum unlocks (deep quantum)
notes: By FY55: phase-5 mostly landed. Quantum-engineered materials become the substrate of half the physical economy ~$100T/yr. Lupine is the canonical audit substrate; 1.5% capture (above Synopsys EDA-mature 1.4%) reflects the structural irreplaceability of validation for quantum-classical hybrid simulations.

name: TCP/IP for designed matter
notes: By FY60: post-quantum-maturity. Lupine is the methodology layer through which all designed matter — quantum-engineered or classical — is verified. ~$200T addressable equals roughly all of physical-economy GDP at 2060. Capture is 2% (TCP/IP-class structural position) at 18x mature-platform multiple.
